text: Concerning baptism, baptize thus: having first said all these things, baptize into the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit in living water.
Wherever the bishop appears, there let the multitude be; even as wherever Jesus Christ is, there is the catholic Church.
It is within the power of all, therefore, in every Church, who may wish to see the truth, to contemplate clearly the tradition of the apostles manifested throughout the whole world.
